creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
hrs         2008-06-01 08:51:52 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    print/ghostscript7   Makefile pkg-descr 
    print/ghostscript7-commfont Makefile pkg-descr 
    print/ghostscript7-jpnfont Makefile pkg-descr 
    print/ghostscript7-korfont Makefile pkg-descr 
    print/ghostscript7-nox11 Makefile 
    print/ghostscript8   Makefile pkg-descr 
    print/ghostscript8-nox11 Makefile 
  Removed files:
    print/ghostscript7   Makefile.inc 
  Log:
  The following repocopies have been done for print/ghostscript-*
  reorganization:
  
          print/ghostscript-gnu -> print/ghostscript7
          print/ghostscript-gnu-nox11 -> print/ghostscript7-nox11
          print/ghostscript-gnu-commfont -> print/ghostscript7-commfont
          print/ghostscript-gpl -> print/ghostscript8
          print/ghostscript-gpl-nox11 -> print/ghostscript8-nox11
          japanese/ghostscript-gnu-jpnfont -> print/ghostscript7-jpnfont
          korean/ghostscript-gnu-korfont -> print/ghostscript7-korfont
  
  and clean up Makefile of each port for the changes, and assign the
  maintainers to doceng@.
  
  Not hooked up to the build yet because it needs more fixes in
  dependent ports and bsd.port.mk.
  
  PR:     ports/124157
